name: MouseScrollTweaks
description: Per-axis scroll inversion and optional smoothing for traditional mouse wheels (trackpads / Magic Mouse pass through untouched).
author: Cato Kolås <cato.kolas@gmail.com>

config.label: Invert vertical scroll
config.description: Flip the vertical mouse-wheel direction, independent of the system Natural-scrolling toggle.

config.label: Smoothness
config.description: Smoothing intensity (0 = passthrough, only inversion applies). Mid grades (5–10) feel subtle; 10–15 approximates mac-mouse-fix; 15–20 leans into long glides.

optionalModules.name: hs._ckol.smoothscroll
optionalModules.description: Posts continuous-scroll CGEvents from a CVDisplayLink — the same shape macOS trackpads emit, so receiving apps treat the whole momentum tail as one logical scroll. Without it the Spoon falls back to an inline pure-Lua smoothing engine.
